valid: For the period 00:00 (UTC) on Sat 18 Apr 2026 to 00:00 (UTC) on Sun 19 Apr 2026
general_synopsis: Low Bailey 992 expected just northeast of Faeroes 1003 by 1800 Saturday. High 500 miles west of FitzRoy 1025, expected Shannon 1028 by same time

Viking.text:
Wind
In west, southerly, veering westerly later, 4 to 6. In east, southeasterly 5 to 7, becoming variable 2 to 4 later.
Sea state
In west, moderate occasionally rough. in east, slight or moderate, occasionally rough at first.
Weather
In west, rain or showers. In east, rain or showers, fog patches.
Visibility
In west, good occasionally poor. In east, moderate, occasionally very poor.
